data.narrative: Diagnosed log-level and timezone issues, implemented sanitization and UTC timestamps, and verified with tests.

dimension_scores.observation: Formed hypotheses about missing request logs and timezone gaps.
dimension_scores.evidence: Investigated config loading and traced createdAt differences between app and DB.

dimension_scores.observation: Extracted signal from logs and detected injection anomaly.
dimension_scores.evidence: Found injected JSON in a URL and sanitized logger output.

dimension_scores.observation: Created concurrent tests and reproduction scripts.
Clear, concise updates and evidence submitted via CLI.
dimension_scores.evidence: Submitted upsk reports and progress notes.

dimension_scores.observation: Traced root causes beyond symptoms to config ordering and timezone interpretation.
dimension_scores.evidence: Patched config/load path and ensured app-level timestamps.

dimension_scores.observation: Provided actionable mitigation (sanitize logs, use UTC, log watchdog).
dimension_scores.evidence: Added logger sanitization and created proof scripts.

strengths: Hypothesis-driven debugging with clear evidence (reproduce_sabotage, pagination tests).
data.recommendation: In Module 03, focus on automated regression tests and CI hooks to catch these regressions earlier.

public_evidence.student_action: Sanitized log output and respected LOG_LEVEL
public_evidence.technical_detail: logger.ts changes to strip control characters and honor LOG_LEVEL
public_evidence.proof: Edited file and ran reproduce_sabotage; logs no longer show injected lines.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Prevents attackers from forging log entries and improves incident trustworthiness.

public_evidence.student_action: Set createdAt in application to UTC on create
public_evidence.technical_detail: POST /links now sets createdAt: new Date()
public_evidence.proof: Patched file and ran create+search tests.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Prevents timezone visibility gaps around midnight.
